Name:
JOJI [V1]
aka. Chloe Burbank [V1]
Notes:
(05/11/2014) (A "JOJI" project is announced, intended for release in the summer of 2014)
(01/13/2016) (Chloe Burbank Volume 1 is announced)
Leak Date: Before the release of "PINK GUY" a "JOJI" album was announced in "CHIN CHIN IS NOT PLEASED". It was intended for release in the summer of 2014, and was said to have "nearly everything we've heard before that wasn't on the Pink Guy album". However, the project of course never ended up releasing in 2014, and was it later revamped and worked on further.

Name:
Chloe Burbank Volume 1 [V2]
aka. JOJI [V2]
Notes:
(01/13/2016) (Chloe Burbank Volume 1 is announced)
(12/26/2016) (Rollout for Chloe Burbank begins from 88rising)
(??/??/2017) (Chloe Burbank is scrapped and is then reworked into two seperate EPs)
Leak Date: Two singles released a year later in 2015 with an announcement for "Chloe Burbank Volume 1" on social media. Joji began releasing more tracks on SoundCloud throughout the following years before signing to 88rising in hopes of releasing the project, but he was unfortunately met with sample clearance issues that he'd complain about on Twitter, and ultimately decided the decision to scrap the project, and began converting the project into a smaller EP.

Name: In Tongues
Notes:
(10/27/2017) (Lost Instruments is released as promotion for In Tongues)
(11/03/2017) (In Tongues is released)
Leak Date: After scrapping most of "Chloe Burbank Volume 1", Joji began to work on converting the project into an EP for the following months, eventually becoming "In Tongues". Some reminants of the "Chloe Burbank Volume 1" project can be found throughout the EP, as "Pills" actually interpolates "Thom" from the previous project.

Name: BALLADS 1
Notes:
(11/03/2017) (In Tongues is released)
(10/26/2018) (BALLADS 1 is released)
Leak Date: After the release of the "In Tongues" EP. Joji began to work on his next project, his first full length album under Joji, which he would work on alongside the "Head In The Clouds" project. Joji would begin working with a lot more producers and artists, and do lots of live shows while working on the project, even performing unfinished versions of songs.

(prod. Joji)
Notes:
Previewed on Joji’s Instagram account just days before the release of BALLADS 1.
Nothing is currently known about it besides that it has a changed pitch and speed.
It could just be that the song was edited only for the intention of the Instagram post.

Name: Nectar
Notes:
(10/26/2018) (BALLADS 1 is released)
(08/25/2020) (Nectar is finished)
(09/25/2020) (Nectar is released)
Leak Date: After the release of the "BALLADS 1" project, Joji would begin working with more and more producers and writers, and eventually leaving behind the lofi & trap sounds that many of us became used to over the years. There was lots of marketing in between the releases, which made the project very memorable as well. The project was announced on April 17th 2020, and was planned for release on July 10th 2020. However, on June 12th 2020, Joji announced that the album had been delayed to September 25th, 2020, citing the COVID-19 pandemic. A month after the project's release, Joji would do a paid virtual live stream titled "The Extravaganza" with live perfomances and comedic skits.

Name:
pretty boy [Teaser]
(prod. Patrick Wimberly, John Durham & Joji)
Notes:
Teaser for "Pretty Boy". The version used in the teaser didn't feature Lil Yachty.
The song was seemingly not intended for the album until Lil Yachty featured on it.

Name:
✨ Lil Gnar - No Cosign [Teaser]
(feat. Joji) (prod. Ronny J)
Notes:
OG Filename: Lil Gnar - No Cosign (feat. Joji).mp3
Released on Lil Gnar's SoundCloud account before being deleted.
Ronny J and Joji first met during a studio session for the Head In The Clouds record. This was likely the session that Joji would end up recording vocals for “No Cosign”. Sometime after that session, “Genesis” by Wifisfuneral was released using the same beat. More than likely Lil Gnar didn’t get word of this and teased the song a year later. The song was likely scrapped after he found out the beat had already been used.

Name: SMITHEREENS
Notes:
(09/25/2020) (Nectar is released)
(11/04/2022) (SMITHEREENS is released)
Leak Date: After the release of "Nectar" and after the "Nectar: The Finale" tour had concluded, there was hiatus from Joji for six months before the release of the lead single "Glimpse of Us" which leaked days prior to the song's announcement, with the "SMITHEREENS" album releasing a few months later. The project has two discs, the first disc includes songs that Joji only wrote on and sang, but the second disc starts off with "NIGHT RIDER" which switches up the flow of the project, going from melancholic ballads to a trap beat with electronic-like elements. Sadly, the project continues with more songs that Joji only wrote on and sang like "1AM FREESTYLE", with the exception of "YUKON (INTERLUDE)".

Name:
✨ Forehead Touch the Ground [Teaser]
(prod. Isaac Sleator & Myles Avery)
(writ. Joji, & Isaac Sleator & Myles Avery)
aka. AUDIO 2
Notes:
OG Filename: 10157.wav
On January 8th, 2026, The "JOJI Vault" website was launched on "vault.jojimusic.com". The website used a lot of visuals that took cues from the PIXELATED KISSES Visualizer. The website was originally emailed to people who were subscribed to the Joji newsletters with passwords that could unlock certain audios. Different people would be emailed the passwords for Audio 1, 2, & 3, which were snippets of songs that would be on the album. The codes pointed to tracks of the album in which the snippets contained, with the first 2 numbers being the track number, and the last 3 being the length. Hotel California, Forehead Touch the Ground, and Horses To Water were all originally teased through this website.
